name: Nxu, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Nxu, Inc. (Nxu, the Company or we) is a US-based technology company focused on leveraging its intellectual property and innovations to support energy storage and charging solutions for the infrastructure needed to power an electrified future. Nxu historically focused on building megawatt (MW) charging stations and developing innovative battery cells and battery packs for use in advanced energy storage systems, and mobility products.
